title: Large Ice Cube Moulds, 4.5cm Square Ice Cube Trays with Lids, Set of 2 Big Silicone Ice Cube Tray Food Grade & BPA Free & Easy-Release for Freezer Cocktail Whiskey Drinks
features: BIGGER, EASIER - Bigger ice cube (size: 4.5 x 4.5 x 4 cm), while easier to take out. Press gently on the bottom and the ice ‘pops out’.
NON SPILL LIDS - With the good protection of the spill-proof lid, you will get clean and odourless ice. Stackable design saves space.
ENJOY BETTER FLAVOR - 2 big ice cube trays allow you to make 16 square ice cubes. Bigger ice cubes will ensure better flavour of the drink, perfect for whiskey, cocktail, and more.
SAFE & PREMIUM - The large ice cube moulds are made of food-grade and BPA-free silicone and plastic, 100% safe to use directly with food and drinks.
DISHWAHER SAFE - Durable and dishwasher-safe large ice cube tray will bring a lot of convenienceto everyday use, so you can enjoy coolness with ease.
